title: Arctic sensing depth exceeds deployment depth
note: The landscape is strongest in sensing and fusion but only a few capabilities look ready for immediate engagement

title: Infrastructure and integration decide whether sensing value is real
note: Many strong sensing options still depend on relay power and software layers to work in remote Arctic settings

title: Autonomous platforms remain strategically relevant but immature
note: The most novel maritime and over-snow systems still sit in Build or early Validate rather than procurement-facing maturity

title: Canadian context helps but domestic late-stage depth is limited
note: Canada-based suppliers are relevant to Arctic operations but only a small subset look ready for immediate action
